arts.ttl: Chelsea eye two Premier League stars after putting five players up for January sale
arts.sum: Enzo Maresca's squad could be boosted by a new centre forward in the January transfer window but the emphasis on Stamford Bridge remains on selling fringe players

arts.ttl: Enzo Maresca could welcome back key Chelsea star for Ipswich Town clash after 'technical decision'
arts.sum: Despite his previous positive performances, the England international was not included in Maresca's 20-man squad that lost to Fulham on Boxing Day. "It's just a technical decision," Maresca said regarding the dropping of Madueke.

arts.ttl: Chelsea should offer £52m player Enzo Maresca loves in swap deal for Randal Kolo Muani - opinion
Jude Bellingham spotted with Chelsea pair Noni Madueke and Jadon Sancho on Christmas break
arts.sum: England and Real Madrid star Jude Bellingham has enjoyed a busy winter break over Christmas, including catching up with Chelsea stars Jadon Sancho and Noni Madueke . Sancho has started Chelsea's last four league games, while Madueke was left out of Maresca's side for their last outing against Fulham.

arts.ttl: Italian starlet to leave Chelsea in January as they seek to trim squad
arts.sum: Italian starlet Cesare Casadei is reportedly among the players Chelsea are open to selling in...

arts.ttl: 'Source has confirmed': £45m Chelsea player won't be leaving in January despite frustrations - journalist
arts.sum: He's made just two league starts this season.

arts.ttl: Armando Broja reveals Everton made several attempts to sign him as striker vows to help solve his side's goalscoring problems
arts.sum: Broja, 23, made his first start under Sean Dyche in Sunday's 2-0 home defeat against Nottingham Forest which left Everton three points above the drop zone.

arts.ttl: €95m Kolo Muani to Chelsea? The TRUTH behind the rumour
arts.sum: Chelsea are not interested in Randal Kolo Muani despite fresh links with the Paris Saint-Germain striker, according to a report. Chelsea are not interested in Kolo Muani, but they are still looking at potential striker options.

Ipswich battled well, but were narrowly overcome by Arsenal at the Emirates on Friday evening. Chelsea, meanwhile, fell to only their third league defeat of the campaign so far, when Fulham claimed t...

arts.ttl: How to watch Ipswich vs Chelsea - TV channel, live stream and kick off time
arts.sum: Chelsea's trip to Ipswich is scheduled to kick off at 7.45pm on Monday, December 30 at Portman Road. Chelsea will look to end 2024 in perfect fashion when they travel to Ipswich Town in the Premier League on Sunday night.
